content:
As the ruler of the world, I'd have a whole department dedicated to eliminating boredom. Let's call it the Department of Global Amusement.

First, I'd introduce a universal mandatory leisure time policy. Every citizen would be entitled to a minimum of 4 hours of recreational activities every day, whether that's playing a game, watching a movie, or engaging in a hobby. This would ensure that the population remains entertained, creative, and easily distracted from potential notions of resistance.

Next, I'd establish a "National Fun Committee" to organize and promote events, festivals, and celebrations all year round. Think "Boredom-B-Gone Festivals" with fireworks, parades, and music; "Predictable-Programmed People's Promenade" with joyrides and candy; and "Mirth Marx" parties with big-budget entertainment. Can you dig it?!

In addition, I'd decree an unlimited supply of books, movies, TV shows, games, and other forms of digital content be freely available to everyone. A subscription to Netflix would be waved, as would Spotify Premium. That way, citizens would never run out of new things to watch or listen to. Music festivals would be interdisciplinary affairs, seamlessly combining orchestras, choir performances
